diagrams.title: DFS Tree with Articulation Points
diagrams.description: Shows DFS tree structure with discovery times and low values to identify articulation points
elements: Back edges shown as dashed lines
Marked articulation points based on low ≥ disc condition
diagrams.purpose: Learn to identify cut-vertices using DFS properties

diagrams.title: Block-Cut Tree Example
diagrams.description: Bipartite tree showing relationship between cut-vertices and blocks in a graph
elements: Edges connecting cut-vertices to their blocks
diagrams.purpose: Understand block decomposition and graph connectivity structure

diagrams.title: Bridge Identification Example
diagrams.description: Graph highlighting bridges versus edges in cycles
diagrams.purpose: Learn to identify bridges in graphs
